content:
- Full gates passed after the benchrunner refactor: make check, make test, and make lint all succeeded.
- Marked story-03 task-02 done/passing, checked off the executed plan slices, and ran .ralph/task_switch.sh successfully.
- Next: review git status, commit all changes with the required task-finished message including test evidence, push, and stop.

- Read progress log and current task summaries.
- Verified story-03/task-02 is done in current_tasks_done.md, which unblocks story-04/task-01.
- Current active backlog appears to be a pure dependency chain with no active bug tasks and no priority tags surfaced yet; next step is to confirm from task files and write the first unblocked failing task to .ralph/current_task.txt.

- Refreshed Ralph task summaries and re-read the choose-task rules.
- Resolved blockers from .ralph/current_tasks.md against .ralph/current_tasks_done.md: no active bug tasks, no visible priority tags, and only story-04/task-01 is both failing and unblocked because story-03/task-02 already passes.
- Wrote .ralph/tasks/story-04-observability/task-01-stats-aggregation.md to .ralph/current_task.txt and quit immediately as required.

- Read saved progress, current task pointer, and the required improve-code-boundaries and tdd skill instructions.
- Confirmed the active task is .ralph/tasks/story-04-observability/task-01-stats-aggregation.md.
- Next I am reading the task file to determine whether I must create or refine a plan first, or execute an approved plan.

- Read the story-04 stats aggregation task and confirmed it is not yet in NOW EXECUTE state.
- Switched to planning mode per Ralph instructions.
- Next I am inspecting existing plan-file conventions and the current benchmark/stats code layout so the new plan is concrete and executable.

- Inspected current benchmarkrun/coordinator and benchrunner/runtime/workload code plus existing runner tests and plan conventions.
- Identified the main boundary issue: lifecycle state lives in benchmarkrun while execution data/stats do not have a clean contract yet.
- Next I am checking JSON serialization touch points and option types so the plan can define one canonical stats surface without adding duplicate DTOs.

- Planned story-04/task-01 and added the task <plan> pointer.
- Wrote .ralph/tasks/story-04-observability/task-01-stats-aggregation_plans/2026-04-30-stats-aggregation-plan.md.
- Chose the main boundary refactor: keep benchmarkrun.State for lifecycle, add benchmarkrun.Results for /benchmark/results, keep stats collection private to benchrunner, and use fixed-shape operation_rates plus bounded histogram quantiles.
- Promoted the plan to NOW EXECUTE and stopped without implementation, per Ralph instructions.
- Next turn should execute the plan with vertical TDD slices, updating tests and code together, then run make check, make lint, and make test.

- Read saved progress, current task pointer, and the required improve-code-boundaries and tdd skill instructions.
- Confirmed the active task is .ralph/tasks/story-04-observability/task-01-stats-aggregation.md and prior progress already promoted its plan to NOW EXECUTE.
- Next I am reading the task file and linked plan, then I will execute in vertical TDD slices and keep appending progress as I go.

- Read the task and approved plan. Confirmed execution mode.
- Inspected benchmarkrun/coordinator, httpserver handlers/tests, and benchrunner runtime/workload code.
- Confirmed the main boundary gap remains: /benchmark/results still returns State and benchrunner has no stats contract yet.
- Next I am reading the remaining benchrunner surface and then I will add the first red test on the public /benchmark/results shape.

- Added benchmarkrun.Results/Stats and switched /benchmark/results to the new public results boundary.
- Implemented private benchrunner operationKind classification plus a bounded histogram/counter stats collector with live snapshots.
- Added focused tests for p95/p99, warmup-aware TPS/elapsed time, success/failure counts, active/configured clients, compact latest_error, live/final results snapshots, and stable results JSON shape.
- Fixed two test harness timing assumptions around incremental completions and worker scale-up token release.
- Next I am validating the widened httpserver boundary, then running make check, make lint, and make test before updating Ralph task state.
